documents.title: scripts directory
documents.summary: This directory contains project scripts used for automation and development tasks. It is intentionally tracked in the repository so collaborators can run and maintain these utilities.

documents.title: Agent Skills
documents.summary: [!NOTE] Work in Progress — This repository is under active development. More skills are being added, existing skills are being updated to use the latest SDK patterns, and tests are being expanded to ensure quality. Contributions welcome!

documents.title: Barodybroject
documents.summary: Barodybroject is a Django 5.1 application for generating and managing parody news content with OpenAI. It runs against PostgreSQL, exposes Django REST Framework endpoints, includes a Jekyll static-site sidecar for published content, and deploys to Azure Container Apps with Bicep infrastructure.

documents.title: ⚔️ Bashcrawl — learn the terminal by playing
documents.summary: v3.1 — one game, two doors: the classic filesystem dungeon in your terminal, and a free browser trainer with mini-games and cheatsheets built from the same content.

documents.title: zer0-mistakes
documents.summary: Free • Open source • Hosted on GitHub Pages for $0/month • Works on Mac, Windows, and Linux

documents.title: IT-Journey
documents.summary: Welcome to IT-Journey, a gamified, open-source platform for learning IT and software development through quests — progressive, hands-on adventures that take you from zer0 to her0. The site is built around a single gamified learning path, supported by reference docs, quick-start guides, and curated notes. The repositor…

documents.title: Wargames
documents.summary: The wargames offered by the OverTheWire community can help you to learn and practice security concepts in the form of fun-filled games.
